action.reasoning: Observation: the stricter room endgame threshold 0.9997 reduced room success from 0.82 to 0.80 and underperformed the best 0.9995 room-only endgame checkpoint. Analysis: the useful effect comes from triggering endgame earlier enough to convert near-threshold failures; stricter hurts. A lower threshold may convert additional room near-misses, but could increase distance. Since only room has upside and tunnel/outdoor should remain baseline, try one targeted room-only lower-threshold variant while preserving all other best settings.
